tasks_completed: Create src/toolkit.py with Trace + four sublayers (BrowseLayer, EmailLayer, VaultLayer, BlockerLayer)
Ensure data/ dir has .gitkeep and add vault.json/blockers.json/portfolio.json to .gitignore
Create src/test_toolkit.py — 27 passing tests (no API keys needed)
learnings: Toolkit follows same threading.Lock + JSON persistence pattern as PortfolioManager
BrowseLayer uses Playwright over CDP to connect to Browserbase sessions
Graceful degradation: all methods return error dict / False / empty string / empty list when API keys missing
VaultLayer.list_keys() explicitly excludes 'value' field — never expose secrets
Trace.summary() returns last 20 steps; result strings truncated to 80 chars at log() time
BlockerLayer.report() stores trace.to_dict() verbatim on the report record
python -m src.traces reads both data/blockers.json and data/portfolio.json for traced operations
